testimonials.author: Biagina Cianfrogna
testimonials.text: Highlights, colour and cut is exactly what I want, and she gets it right all the time!!

testimonials.author: Filomena Paoletta
testimonials.text: Mary is my stylist and she is AMAZING! She always cuts exactly how I want it.

testimonials.author: Colette Gagne
testimonials.text: I must take a moment to shout out to Darlene she's a wonderful hair stylist kind caring and truly an amazing at her job.

testimonials.author: Jolanta Miszkiel
testimonials.text: I have been a customer at West Ends Hair Salon for many years, and I continue to be impressed, and very happy with the professionalism, excellent service, and friendliness of all staff.

testimonials.author: Stella Harrison
testimonials.text: Darlene is the heart and soul in that place...She definitely knows how to cut hair well. My hair has never felt or looked as good.

testimonials.author: Silvana Campese
testimonials.text: Mary did an awesome job on cutting my hair going to support local business in the area.
